data.title: Plugin Loader: non-null allowed-tools set on 32 SKILL.md files -> still only 3 skills loaded on /reload-plugins
data.description:
## Incident Overview

P0 — third occurrence of skill loading failure. Two prior fix attempts have not resolved the issue.

### Prior Fix Attempts
1. Bug 06fc-1ebc (commit 5418956e): Added bare `allowed-tools:` (YAML null) to 29 SKILL.md files. Result: still 3 skills. Closed prematurely.
2. Bug 9a3b-7426 (commit 91134e4b): Set non-null `allowed-tools: Read, Write, Edit, Glob, Grep, Bash` on 30 files. Result: still 3 skills after version bump to 1.11.25 and /reload-plugins.

### Observed Behavior
/reload-plugins reports: '1 plugin · 3 skills · 29 agents · 14 hooks'
Expected: 32 skills

### Key Evidence
- All 32 SKILL.md files have non-null allowed-tools values (verified via yaml.safe_load)
- plugin.json has `"skills": "./skills/"` (directory reference)
- The 3 loading skills are unknown — may be the same 3 that always loaded
- Version bump to 1.11.25 confirmed via /plugin command
- Plugin cache at ~/.claude/plugins/cache/ serves the files
